commit.subject: LU-5823 clio: add cl_object_fiemap()
commit.message:
LU-5823 clio: add cl_object_fiemap()

* Add cl_object_operations::coo_fiemap().
* Add cl_object_fiemap() to get FIEMAP mappings.
